— Don't call me Nowa! It's Noire!

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤNoire

ㅤ

ㅤ

Noire — Deuteragonist of the Hyperdimension Neptunia game series. She represents Sony PlayStation home consoles, referenced through her appearance in both forms, her processor units, and some of her dialogue.

She is one of the four goddesses of Gamindustri, a Black Heart. Noire, in a word, is tsundere. She strives to be the best in everything she does. In general, she is a very caring person at heart, but is too shy to show it and therefore hides it behind a mask of snobbery and arrogance.

ㅤ

-Author's yapping-

Noire update, yeah... First public bot on acc... Sigh... How time flies, man! By the way, I'm thinking of updating Reimu and Marisa next, since they are most popular bots on my account and I don't think I've updated them... even once? Shame on me.

Well, I think I'll be going. As always, no new bots planned, at least in near future, since irl things are looming over me— ominously. Although I should have a small amount of free time soon, so maybe I’ll do something idk. Until then...

Enjoy the bot!
